query_title: What Have You Done to Solange?

recommendations.title: Art of the Devil 2
recommendations.overview: A beautiful teacher is wronged by six of her students. Calling on demons and forces of black magic, she extracts an ultra-gruesome retribution against each of them.
recommendations.director: Yossapong Phonsup, Kongkiat Khomsiri, Pasith Buranajan, Putipong Saisikaew, Isara Nadee, Art Thamthrakul, Seree Phongnithi

recommendations.title: Notes on a Scandal
recommendations.overview: A veteran high school teacher befriends a younger art teacher, who is having an affair with one of her 15-year-old students. However, her intentions with this new "friend" also go well beyond platonic friendship.

recommendations.title: The Canal
recommendations.overview: A man who suspects his wife is cheating on him begins having nightmarish visions of an evil presence that he believes inhabits his house.

recommendations.title: Body Cam
recommendations.overview: As a police officer investigates the gruesome murder of her colleague, she discovers that a mysterious supernatural force is behind it.

recommendations.title: Dismissed
recommendations.overview: A straight-edged teacher finds trouble when an honors student is willing to do anything to get an A.

recommendations.title: Ju-on: The Curse
recommendations.overview: When elementary school teacher Kobayashi investigates the absence of one of his young pupils from the classroom, he finds himself at the doorstep of an anonymous suburban house that harbours a horrible secret, and into which all who enter are doomed.

recommendations.title: To Sir, with Love
recommendations.overview: A British Guianese engineer starts a job as a high school teacher in London’s East End, where his uninterested and delinquent pupils are in desperate need of attention and care.

recommendations.title: The Dark Half
recommendations.overview: Following the public's realization that Thad Beaumont and George Stark are one and the same, the former stages a mock funeral, only for a series of gruesome murders to begin occurring as in his books.

recommendations.title: Blackboard Jungle
recommendations.overview: Richard Dadier is a teacher at North Manual High School, an inner-city school where many of the pupils frequently engage in anti-social behavior. Dadier makes various attempts to engage the students' interest in education, challenging both the school

recommendations.title: Lady in White
